message:
feat(tui): strengthen WCAG contrast guard, apply theme-aware styling to search/thread screens

Raises the minimum text contrast ratio from 3.0 to 4.5 (WCAG AA level)
and improves the contrast guard to evaluate foreground readability
against multiple possible background candidates when the cell background
is transparent. Adds consistent theme-aware styling throughout search
and thread screens.

- Raise MIN_TEXT_CONTRAST_RATIO from 3.0 to 4.5 for WCAG AA compliance
- Evaluate contrast against worst-case background from [panel_bg,
  bg_surface, bg_deep] when cell background is transparent
- Expand best_readable_fg candidate pool with text_muted, status_fg,
  status_accent, pure black, and pure white fallbacks
- Add test for contrast guard behavior with transparent background cells
- Apply text_primary style to search result list, guidance panel,
  detail view paragraphs, and empty-state placeholder text
- Apply text_hint style to "No results found" and "Select a result"
  placeholders for visual hierarchy
- Apply primary_style to non-selected search result rows
- Use truncate_display_width instead of truncate_str for summary line
- Fix thread detail participant name truncation formatting
- Update Cargo.lock (asupersync 0.2.2→0.2.3, windows-sys downgrades)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
